title: Formation Declaration
description: Schema for formation.yaml — the formation-level automation contract declaring signal topology, cadence, and governance constraints per INST-FORMATION (FORM-001 through FORM-007).

formation_type.description: One of the seven canonical formation types

host_organ_primary.description: Primary organ this formation belongs to (e.g., ORGAN-I, META-ORGANVM)

host_organ_secondary.description: Additional organs this formation participates in

metaphysical_role.description: The formation's role in the system's ontological architecture

question.description: The fundamental question this formation exists to answer

maturity_level.description: Top-Down Refinement Pipeline maturity level (R0 vision through R8 evolution law)

promotion_state.description: Current promotion state in the governance state machine

exit_modes.description: Permitted exit strategies for this formation

scope_boundary.description: Explicit boundary of what this formation includes and excludes

feedback_policy.description: How feedback signals from downstream are handled

feedfront_policy.description: How feedforward signals to downstream are shaped

clock_source.description: What drives this formation's cadence (e.g., event-driven, cron, manual)

attenuation_policy.description: How this formation dampens or amplifies signals at boundaries

max_active_horizon_days.description: Maximum number of days this formation may remain active without review

migration_target_classes.description: Formation types this formation may migrate into

signal_class.description: One of the 14 canonical signal classes or a custom extension

includes.description: Repos, modules, or domains explicitly within scope

excludes.description: Repos, modules, or domains explicitly out of scope
